creator: johann@egenetics.com
text:
Could someone please just close this PR without taking any further action.

Reasons:

- I understand the interplay between omniORB and omniORBpy much better now
  than when I submitted this PR.  I now believe that some of what I tried to
  achieve here would be ill-conceived.  (E.g. many of the files here
  installed by an omniORBpy port should be installed by the base omniORB
  port.  This is already reflected in a patch to the omniORB port which I've
  submitted to that port's maintainer.)

- In the light of the above, I now think the best course of action would
  probably be to roll omniORBpy into the omniORB port.  Since omniORB is
  already dependent on Python, this would add minimal bloat.  I'll take up
  the matter with the omniORB port's maintainer once I have patches ready.

- This version of omniORBpy in this PR is outdated anyway.

Thanks,
-- Johann
